summary: Rewrote all user-facing local-store recovery messages/hints (tools.go MCP, data_source.go, sync_hint.go, store.go) to reference the quote/watch ledger-population path instead of a non-existent 'sync' command.
reason: Blacklane has no list-syncable resources (catalog is GET-by-slug, prices is POST), so Printing Press v4.28.0 correctly omits the 'sync' command — but it still emits generic sync-recovery messages ('Run blacklane-pp-cli sync ...') that dead-end on an unknown command. Blacklane's local SQLite store is the quote ledger, populated by running quote/watch, so the messages now point there.
validated_outcome: go build + go vet + verify-skill clean; no residual 'blacklane-pp-cli sync' references in tools.go/data_source.go.
upstream_issue: generator emits sync-recovery messages even when no sync command is generated (no syncable resources); the internal/learn domain-neutral 'run sync to refresh entity lookups' text has the same latent issue
